title: RecurringObligations
description: The forward-looking schedule of committed recurring outflows (amount + expected date per upcoming occurrence) over a horizon — the money-facing view Pay's sequencer and Cash Safety's runway consume (umbrella Provides list; FR-BILL-001/003). Provided by Module 4 to Cash Safety, Pay, Tasks, Shopping, and Inbox. Amounts are integer minor units (cents), already FX-converted upstream. Each occurrence carries a FreshnessStamp; estimated occurrences (variable amount or irregular cadence) are explicitly flagged so consumers never treat an estimate as a settled obligation.

horizon_days.description: Forward horizon over which obligations are projected.

data_completeness.description: partial when computed on a partial account picture.

obligation_id.description: Stable id for this projected occurrence; idempotent across re-projection.

expected_on.description: Expected charge date for this occurrence (UTC date).

amount.description: Expected outflow amount, integer CAD cents (FX-converted upstream).

necessity.description: Necessity classification carried through from the series, so Pay's sequencer can prioritize essentials.

is_estimated.description: true when amount and/or date are estimated (variable-amount bill or irregular cadence). Consumers MUST NOT treat an estimated obligation as a settled money input.
